creator: m.viey@wanadoo.fr
text:
Created attachment 241258
cmus build with USE=ncurses:port

Hello,

I just tried your suggestion. Sadly I got the same behavior. I join the complete output of my attempt.

I wonder if it would not be the opposite problem (the library from the ports that would not be adapted). Indeed it is an emacs dependency and maybe I had installed cmus before emacs the first time.

I am going to try to rebuild cmus with ncurses port completely removed from my system.
